welcomeMessage: Hello! 👋 Welcome to WhiteHouse Education Foundation. I'm here to help you with admissions, programs, scholarships, campus life, and more. How can I assist you today?
fallbackMessage: We're currently building our chatbot and it will be available soon! For immediate help, please contact us at info@whitehouseeducation.edu.np or call 01-5199456 / 57. Thank you for your patience!
